title: LifeSteal Enchantment
description: This mod adds new lifesteal enchantment that heals your health each time you hit an target
body:
# Life Steal Enchantment - Mod Description

Life Steal Enchantment is a powerful combat-focused enchantment that allows players to heal by draining health from their enemies with every successful melee attack. The amount of health restored depends on both the sword’s base damage and the enchantment level, making stronger weapons even more effective with this enchantment.

##  ⚔️ How It Works:

When you hit an enemy, you absorb a portion of the damage dealt as health.  
Healing is influenced by the enchantment level:  
\- Level 1: 10% of sword damage restored  
\- Level 2: 20% of sword damage restored  
\- Level 3: 30% of sword damage restored

Different targets provide different healing:  
\- Passive mobs (e.g., cows, sheep) → 2x healing  
\- Hostile mobs (e.g., zombies, skeletons) → Normal healing  
\- Players (PvP) → Reduced healing (50% less)

## 🔮 Enchantment Details:

Can be applied to swords.  
Compatible with other combat enchantments like Sharpness and Unbreaking.  
Works in both Singleplayer and Multiplayer.  
⚠️ Balance Considerations:  
\- Stronger weapons provide better healing, making high-damage weapons more useful.  
\- PvP balancing ensures healing is reduced when fighting other players.  
\- Healing does not trigger when attacking undead mobs (e.g., Zombies, Skeletons).

## 🛡️ Ideal for:

\- ✔️ Players who want a vampiric combat style  
\- ✔️ Survival & Hardcore mode for better sustain in fights  
\- ✔️ Custom PvP servers with balanced lifesteal mechanics

Get ready to steal life from your foes and become an unstoppable warrior!

![Talents Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ced52b2b02cac161584a8383126ba64c90ceec.png)

Check out Talents on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/talents)

# 🧠 Talent Expansion – Master Combat, Defense, and Survival with Unique Talents!

Talent Expansion adds a customizable talent tree system to Minecraft, giving players the power to unlock and level up abilities using Talent Crystals — special items crafted by surrounding a Nether Star with Emeralds.

## 🔹 How It Works:

*   Unlock talents by spending Talent Crystals, which can be crafted using 8 Emeralds surrounding 1 Nether Star
    
*   Open the Talent GUI with the V key (customizable in Controls → Key Binds) to view and manage your talent tree.
    

![Talents GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4be50db428456e9b3bc635f29bbbd5fb9d3fd26.png)

*   Talents can be leveled up to increase their effectiveness, with some requiring one prerequisite talent.
    
*   Hover over each talent to display its name & when clicked makes the Unlock Talent Button visible which is used to unlock the selectec talent.
    

***

### 🗡️ Combat Talents

**Attack (Root for Fire Sword & Blow)** – Boosts sword damage.

**Fire Sword** – Melee hits set enemies on fire.

**Quick Sword Hit** – Faster sword attack speed.

**Armor Penetration** – Sword attacks ignore some armor.

**Thunder** – Summons lightning on hit.

**Blow** – Arrows pierce armor.

**Critical Arrow** – Increased arrow crit chance or damage.

**Multishot** – Shoot multiple arrows simultaneously.

**Flame** – Sets targets on fire with arrows.

***

### ✨ Special Talents

**🩸 Life Steal** – Gain health when dealing damage. 🧬 Requires either any of these: Thunder and Flame.

**☠ Resilience** – Reduces duration and strength of negative status effects. 🧬 Requires either any of these: Heal and Thorns.

***

### 🛡️ Defense Talents

**Armor (Root for Knockback Resistance and Featherfall)** – Increases armor defense.

**Knockback Resistance** – Reduces knockback taken.

**Tough Armor** – Additional defense boost.

**Health Boost** – Increases max health.

**Heal** – Heals more when hunger is full.

**Featherfall** – Greatly reduces fall damage.

**Protection** – General damage reduction from all sources.

**Shield** – Chance to auto-block damage with a shield.

**Thorns** – Chance to damage attackers.

⚠ This mod will be shortly available on CurseForge as well.

Leave any suggestions to improve the mod or found a bug report [here](https://github.com/CobraGamingSj/Talents-1.21.4/issues)
